name: retrieve_user_profile_information
description: Retrieves profile information for a specified slack user (defaults to the authenticated user if `user` id is omitted); a provided `user` id must be valid.

user.description:
User ID to retrieve profile information for; defaults to the authenticated user.
Examples:
  "U012A3CDE"
  "W1234567890"

include_labels.description:
Include human-readable labels for custom profile fields. API defaults to false.
Examples:
  true
  false

arguments.description: Specifies the user and options for retrieving their profile.
